bug: Service-document PEPPOL exports fail under the DE PEPPOL localization because PEPPOL30 DE Service Validation transfers Service Invoice/Cr.Memo Header to a Sales Header by matching field numbers, which doesn't copy the Service Header E-Mail to Sales Header Sell-to E-Mail. Needs to be fixed on the DE side.
